# Python dependencies for the LLM eval's STEP file generation.
# Install with: python -m venv eval/generate/.venv && eval/generate/.venv/bin/pip install -r eval/generate/requirements.txt
#
# cadquery is the OCCT-backed Python library used to construct test
# STEP files with known design intent (e.g. "box with 3 through-holes
# of diameters 5mm, 10mm, 15mm"). The generated files become the
# ground-truth fixtures for the LLM eval.

cadquery==2.8.0
